title: Master Advisor Section
description: Validates master.advisor.* per spec § 5.1. Owned exclusively by compensation-advisor. Other skills MUST NOT write to this section.

schema_version.description: Per-section semver per § 12.4. Independent of other sections; bumps when advisor's internal schema changes.

scenario_archetypes.description: Long-lived org-level scenario patterns observed across cycles.

description.description: Human-readable description of this scenario archetype (e.g., 'across-the-board flat percentage').

cycles_used.description: Cycle slugs where this archetype was applied.

outcome.description: Final outcome when this archetype was used.

preferred_council_perspectives.description: Operator-confirmed council seats for this org. Role identifiers only — no person names per § 14.2.

cycle_state_pointers.description: Per-cycle state file pointers. Actual cycle data lives in cycle_dir/advisor/.

state_file.description: Relative path to the per-cycle advisor state file (e.g., '_orgs/acme/cycles/pharmacy-qc-fy26/advisor/engagement-state.yaml').

pre_engagement_artifacts.description: Pre-engagement narrative/data-light/costing artifacts produced before or outside the canonical engagement spine. NOT included in closed-engagement drift queries.

artifact_slug.description: Stable identifier for this pre-engagement artifact.

engagement_mode.description: The partial-flow mode used to produce this artifact.

created_date.description: ISO date when the artifact was created.

intended_drive_path.description: Intended Drive path for the artifact file.

decision_log_ref.description: Pointer to the decision_log entry (dl-NNN) that captures the telescoping rationale, typically decision_type: too_early_pre_engagement_mode_chosen.
